title: Jain-Style Cabbage and Peas Subzi
description: A simple, light, and low-calorie Jain-friendly dish made without onions or garlic.
instructions: Heat oil in a pan. Add mustard seeds and let them pop. Add cumin seeds and hing.
Add chopped cabbage and green peas. Sauté for 2 minutes.
Add turmeric and salt. Mix well.
Cover and cook on low heat for 8-10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until vegetables are tender.
